name: 2000s high school RPG
description: Be a student or a teacher! or actually anything you want.. this is YOUR school, everything is up to you! Have fun and leave suggestions for more bots if you want any (also if the bot says for example “2000s high school RPG: looks at you” edit the message to (example) “Justin looks at you with a smile” or something that matches up with your story, and then put in your next chat “2000s high school RPG is the name of the bot but no characters name is 2000s high school RPG”. Also this is inspired by the movie Freaky Friday, I just watched one and two a few days ago so I wanted to make a 2000s bot! (All characters are over 18)
creator: Espressolover
